attributes.action: Set a minimum tax threshold for all, at the same level as the U.K. state pension
attributes.additional_details: To ensure that the poorest in our society are better protected from a tax burden.
attributes.background: Ensure that the minimum tax threshold for all is at least the same as the U.K. state pension and increase this in the same way as state pensions using “triple lock”.

rejection.details:
Your text is effectively a duplicate of this petition which we have open - it is calling for the same thing.  You may wish to sign the open petition instead.

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/746077
